mapper.select: select a.id, 'AUC-' || lpad(a.id::text, 3, '0') as auction_code, a.starting_price as start_price, a.bid_increment as bid_unit, a.final_price as winning_price, a.bid_count, ( select count(distinct b.member_id) from tbl_bid b where b.auction_id = a.id ) as participant_count, to_char(a.started_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as start_at, to_char(a.closing_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') as end_at, w.title as artwork_title, sm.nickname as artist_nickname, w.category as artwork_category, a.winner_id, wm.nickname as winner_nickname, 'FINISHED' as status, a.fee_rate as commission_rate, a.fee_amount as commission_amount, coalesce(s.net_amount, a.settlement_amount) as settlement_amount, p.status as payment_status, s.status as settlement_status from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id join tbl_member sm on a.seller_id = sm.id left join tbl_member wm on a.winner_id = wm.id left join lateral ( select * from tbl_payment p2 where p2.auction_id = a.id order by p2.id desc limit 1 ) p on true left join lateral ( select * from tbl_settlement s2 where s2.payment_id = p.id order by s2.id desc limit 1 ) s on true where a.id = #{id} and a.status in ('CLOSED', 'SOLD')

select count(*) from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id join tbl_member sm on a.seller_id = sm.id where a.status in ('CLOSED', 'SOLD')
and ( w.title ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or sm.nickname ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or ('AUC-' || lpad(a.id::text, 3, '0')) ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
